tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to identify key features and capabilities of the ClaudeCode product. Document your findings including unique features, functionality gaps compared to our product, and potential improvements we could implement. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze the copilot-cli product to identify its core features, strengths, and weaknesses. Compare it with our current product offering and document the competitive advantages and missing features we should consider implementing. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/copilotcli_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to understand OpenCode's architecture and feature set. Identify what makes it unique, where it falls short, and how we can leverage similar concepts or improve upon them. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze RooCode Competitor
tasks.description: Investigate the roocode product to understand its positioning, target audience, and key differentiators. Document its feature set, user experience, and any gaps that represent opportunities for our product. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/roocode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Create SWARMOUT2 Feature Recommendations Document
tasks.description: Synthesize all competitor analyses from s1-s4 into a comprehensive document called SWARMOUT2.md. Include sections for: 1) Summary of each competitor's strengths/weaknesses, 2) Feature gaps in our product, 3) Prioritized list of recommended features to implement, and 4) Implementation roadmap with milestones.

tasks.title: Generate Detailed Implementation Plan
tasks.description: Based on the recommendations in SWARMOUT2.md, create a detailed implementation plan with specific milestones and tasks. Structure it as: Milestone 1 (MVP features), Milestone 2 (Enhanced functionality), Milestone 3 (Advanced features). For each milestone, list specific development tasks, estimated effort, and dependencies. Save as target/temp/swarmout/implementation_plan.md
